Rows.IDAComment: mode — error sub-op byte (0x0B=11..0x0F=15, 0x10=16..0x13=19, 0x16=22, 0x17=23); each arm shows a StringPool notice dialog with no further packet reads except cases 0x10/0x11/0x13/0x16 which do Decode1 + optional DecodeStr

Rows.Note: atlas: trailing padding byte — client stops reading (harmless over-write)
